fn sum_positive(values: &[i64]) -> i64 {
    let mut total = 0i64;
    // BAD: manual index loop with repeated bounds-checked indexing
    for i in 0..values.len() {
        if values[i] > 0 {
            total += values[i];
        }
    }
    total
}

fn find_max(values: &[f64]) -> Option<f64> {
    if values.is_empty() {
        return None;
    }
    let mut max_val = values[0];
    // BAD: manual index loop
    for i in 1..values.len() {
        if values[i] > max_val {
            max_val = values[i];
        }
    }
    Some(max_val)
}
